Terms of Use

GoalShare · Last updated: July 12, 2026

These Terms of Use (“Terms”) govern your use of the GoalShare mobile application (“the app”). By creating an account or using the app, you agree to these Terms.

1. What GoalShare is

GoalShare is a personal goal-setting, habit-building, and progress-tracking app. It includes tools such as daily tasks, goal tracking, budgeting, nutrition logging, journaling, and contact/lead organization. GoalShare is a motivational and organizational tool — it does not provide medical, financial, legal, or professional advice. Nutrition and activity features are for general wellness information only and are not a substitute for professional guidance.

2. Your account

  • You must provide accurate information and keep your login credentials secure.
  • You are responsible for activity under your account.
  • You must be at least 13 years old to use GoalShare.

3. Subscriptions

  • Some features require a paid subscription (monthly or yearly), billed through your Apple ID.
  • Auto-renewal: subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your Apple ID account is charged for renewal within 24 hours before the period ends.
  • Managing & cancelling: manage or cancel anytime in your device Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions. Deleting the app does not cancel a subscription.
  • If offered, unused portions of free trials are forfeited when a subscription is purchased.
  • Refunds are handled by Apple in accordance with App Store policies.

4. Your content

You own the content you create in GoalShare (goals, journal entries, notes, photos, contacts). You grant us the limited rights needed to store and display that content back to you as part of running the service. You are responsible for having the right to store any contact information (e.g., leads) you enter.

5. Acceptable use

Do not misuse the app: no unlawful activity, no attempting to breach or overload our systems, no reverse-engineering, and no using the app to harass others or to store content you have no right to store.

6. Termination

You may delete your account at any time in the app. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.

7. Disclaimers & limitation of liability

The app is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, GoalShare and its creators are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the app. Nothing in these Terms limits liability that cannot be limited by law.

8. Changes

We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be reflected by the date above and, where appropriate, notice in the app. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated Terms.

9. Contact

Questions: support@goalsharewin.com · Privacy Policy: goalsharewin.com/privacy.html

© 2026 GoalShare · goalsharewin.com
